content: You may create a new room specifically for the backup, choose one of the existing rooms, or save the copy in their {{roomName}} room.

comment.text: This is a descriptive text explaining options for saving a backup. It appears in the auto-backup and manual-backup dialogs. The `{{roomName}}` variable will be replaced with the name of a specific room, such as "My Documents".

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The Arabic translation uses 'الخاصة بك' (your) instead of 'الخاصة بهم' (their), changing the meaning from 'their room' to 'your room'
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: يمكنك إنشاء غرفة جديدة خصيصًا للنسخ الاحتياطي، أو اختيار إحدى الغرف الموجودة، أو حفظ النسخة في غرفة {{roomName}} الخاصة بهم.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The German translation uses 'ihrem' (their/his/her) instead of 'deren' (their) when referring to multiple room options, creating ambiguity about whose room is being referenced
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Sie können einen neuen Raum speziell für die Sicherung erstellen, einen der vorhandenen Räume wählen oder die Kopie in deren {{roomName}}-Raum speichern.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The Japanese translation says 'save the copy in {{roomName}}' but the English says 'save the copy in their {{roomName}} room' - the possessive 'their' and the word 'room' are missing, which changes the meaning
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: バックアップのために新しいルームを特別に作成するか、既存のルームのいずれかを選択するか、それらの{{roomName}}ルームにコピーを保存することができます。

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The phrase 'their {{roomName}} room' is incorrectly translated as 'savā {{roomName}} telpā' (your room) instead of 'viņu {{roomName}} telpā' (their room). This changes the meaning from referring to someone else's room to the user's own room.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Jūs varat izveidot jaunu telpu tieši dublēšanai, izvēlēties vienu no esošajām telpām vai saglabāt kopiju viņu {{roomName}} telpā.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The Dutch translation uses 'uw' (your) instead of 'hun' (their) when referring to the {{roomName}} room, changing the meaning from third person to second person
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: U kunt een nieuwe kamer aanmaken speciaal voor de back-up, een van de bestaande kamers kiezen, of de kopie opslaan in hun {{roomName}} kamer.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The pronoun 'their' (referring to third person) is incorrectly translated as 'sua' (your/second person), changing the meaning from saving in someone else's room to saving in the user's own room
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Você pode criar uma nova sala especificamente para o backup, escolher uma das salas existentes ou salvar a cópia na sala {{roomName}} deles.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The pronoun reference is incorrect - 'their {{roomName}} room' refers to someone else's room, but 'вашей комнате {{roomName}}' means 'your {{roomName}} room'
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Вы можете создать новую комнату специально для резервного копирования, выбрать одну из существующих комнат или сохранить копию в их комнате {{roomName}}.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The pronoun 'their' referring to a third party is incorrectly translated as 'vašoj' (your), changing the meaning from someone else's room to the user's own room
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Možete kreirati novu sobu posebno za rezervnu kopiju, izabrati jednu od postojećih soba ili sačuvati kopiju u njihovoj {{roomName}} sobi.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The pronoun reference is incorrect. The English 'their {{roomName}} room' refers to a third party's room, but the Vietnamese 'phòng {{roomName}} của bạn' translates to 'your {{roomName}} room', changing the meaning from third-person to second-person possession.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Bạn có thể tạo một phòng mới chuyên dùng để sao lưu, chọn một trong các phòng hiện có hoặc lưu bản sao trong phòng {{roomName}} của họ.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The Chinese translation says '为一个备份' (for one backup) instead of '为备份' (for the backup), and '他们的{{roomName}}房间' should be '其{{roomName}}房间' since 'their' refers back to the subject (you/您) in this context
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: 您可以专门为备份创建一个新房间，选择现有的一个房间，或将副本保存在其{{roomName}}房间中。
